race.description: Evergreen Turf Wra Country Championships Q (C5)
race.comment: The rich country championship qualifier is very competitive. KRANICH (2) was doing his best work late, placing over 1200m at this track. Draws out but the longer sprint suits and he has 3.5kg weight relief at this level. Peaks and is still shy of his best. NIMBLE STAR (8) jumped a $2.1F in the same contest and was found to have an issue post-race. Made a big impression beaten a nose at Wyong first-up, and again had no luck finishing 2.5L adrift over 1200m at Randwick. He's on a 9-day return and definitely deserves another chance. BRUTAL LOVE (1) resumed here over shorter beaten a whisker and then recorded an easy win at the track in an 82 over 1200m as a short-priced favourite. Fitter again and he also has winning claims. POISEN POINT (13) resumes and races well here. He's right up to this at best and expect her to be ready for the occasion. A player low in the weights. MICRO MIKKI (7) has pieces of form good enough but has the outside gate to contend with.
